name: JoAi: Update Element

description.en: Edit an existing element's name, type, content, or prompt.
description.de: Bearbeite den Namen, Typ, Inhalt oder Prompt eines bestehenden Elements.

bot: Use this when the user wants to modify an existing element. If the user refers to an element by name, list elements first to find the matching ID.

inputs.name: Agent ID

description.en: The agent that owns this element
description.de: Der Agent, dem dieses Element gehört

inputs.bot: The agent hash ID that owns this element.

inputs.name: Element ID

description.en: The ID of the element to update
description.de: Die ID des zu aktualisierenden Elements

inputs.bot: The element hash ID. If the user refers to an element by name, list elements first to find the matching ID.

inputs.name: Name
inputs.bot: A new name for this element, if the user wants to rename it.

inputs.name: Type
inputs.bot: The updated element type (e.g., text, image, template, prompt).

inputs.name: Content

description.en: Updated content or body of this element
description.de: Aktualisierter Inhalt oder Text dieses Elements

inputs.bot: The updated content, text, or body for this element.

inputs.name: Prompt

description.en: Updated AI prompt for generating this element's content
description.de: Aktualisierter KI-Prompt zur Generierung des Elementinhalts

inputs.bot: An updated generation prompt for this element.
